title: UK-Vietnam FTA Trade Committee – meeting summary, 24 August 2023
body: " This page relates to a meeting that took place on 24 August 2023, during the 2022 to 2024 Sunak Conservative government, and was published later.   A summary of the second Trade Committee meeting under the Free Trade Agreement (FTA) between the United Kingdom (UK) of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and The Socialist Republic of Viet Nam (Vietnam) which took place on 24 August 2023 in Ha Noi.  "
